name: Raspberry Chocolate Bliss
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the raspberries and divide between four individual dishes, reserving a few for decoration.
2. Mix together breadcrumbs, sugar, and 1 1/4 oz of the chocolate in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, whip the creams together and stir in the sherry until well combined.
4. Layer the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the raspberries in each dish.
5. Pour the cream mixture on top of the breadcrumb layer, ensuring it covers the raspberries completely.
6. Place the remaining cream in a piping bag fitted with a large star nozzle.
7. Pipe swirls or decorative patterns in the center of each dish using the piping bag.
8. Decorate with reserved raspberries and sprinkle with the remaining grated chocolate before serving.
